name: Goan Konkani
notes: Goan Konkani (गोंयची कोंकणी / Gõychi Konknni), Goa, India. STUB: the grapheme inventory is NOT yet specified. Konkani is exceptional in being officially written in several scripts — Devanagari (the official script, an abugida), plus Latin (Romi Konkani), Kannada and Malayalam scripts. A per-script grapheme map would be required; none is claimed here.
